hero_subtitle: Register your team for the 36 Hours Ideathon event and showcase your skills
about_event:
Join us for an exciting competition where teams showcase their skills and compete for amazing prizes through challenges that test both technical and creative abilities.
Teams selected from the Ideathon will receive incubation support, mentorship, and potential funding opportunities to help turn their ideas into real-world solutions.
requirements: Payment must be completed for registration
Members can be from any Institutions
